title: Performance
description: The system MUST respond to user input within a reasonable time frame.

title: Reliability
description: The system MUST be able to accurately parse and analyze CVs and provide reliable results.

title: Security
description: The system MUST protect user data and prevent unauthorized access.

title: Privacy
description: The system MUST ensure that user data is handled in accordance with relevant laws and regulations.

title: Scalability
description: The system MUST be able to handle a large volume of users and CVs without compromising performance.

title: Usability
description: The system MUST provide an intuitive and user-friendly interface that is easy to navigate.

title: Maintainability
description: The system MUST be designed to be easily maintained and updated.

title: Compatibility
description: The system MUST be compatible with a variety of devices and browsers.

title: Integration
description: The system MUST be able to integrate with other systems and tools.
